query:
ALTER TABLE `patients`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `externalCustomerId` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `addressNumber` varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `addressComplement` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `neighborhood` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `city` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `state` varchar(2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `zipCode` varchar(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `phone2` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceName` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceNumber` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insurancePlan` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceExpiry` varchar(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `gender` enum('male','female','other','prefer_not_to_say'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maritalStatus` enum('single','married','divorced','widowed','stable_union','other'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `schooling` enum('no_schooling','elementary','middle','high_school','college','postgrad'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `religion` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadSource` enum('chatbot','direct_booking','manual','import') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadStatus` enum('lead','prospect','customer','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lead',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `interactionCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastInteractionAt` timestamp NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3RpD4X9wDf1hcRV.root --database P4nfWouMd7MUucxFWnyo87 --execute ALTER TABLE `patients`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `externalCustomerId` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `addressNumber` varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `addressComplement` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `neighborhood` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `city` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `state` varchar(2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `zipCode` varchar(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `phone2` varchar(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceName` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceNumber` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insurancePlan` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `insuranceExpiry` varchar(10),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `gender` enum('male','female','other','prefer_not_to_say'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maritalStatus` enum('single','married','divorced','widowed','stable_union','other'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `schooling` enum('no_schooling','elementary','middle','high_school','college','postgrad'),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `religion` varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadSource` enum('chatbot','direct_booking','manual','import') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadStatus` enum('lead','prospect','customer','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lead',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `interactionCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastInteractionAt` timestamp NULL;
